prompt: Ultra-detailed luxury travel poster of the Maldives, captured from a breathtaking aerial drone perspective during a perfect tropical day. Crystal-clear turquoise lagoon waters stretch endlessly across the Indian Ocean, displaying vibrant gradients of aqua, cyan, and deep blue. Elegant overwater villas with traditional thatched roofs are connected by a graceful curved wooden boardwalk extending across the shallow reef. A pristine white-sand beach lined with lush palm trees frames the foreground, while a private infinity pool and luxury sun loungers overlook the sparkling sea. Text at Bottom: "MALDIVES" "INDIAN OCEAN" Aspect Ratio: 3:4 Vertical Travel Poster Style Keywords: Luxury travel poster, tropical paradise, aerial photography, Maldives resort, ultra-realistic, vibrant turquoise ocean, cinematic tourism campaign, Pinterest viral, Instagram-worthy, dream vacation destination, premium resort advertisement.
